mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO backtest_trade_detail ( task_id, trade_date, next_trade_date, top_k, cost_bps, stock_code, short_name, rank_no, score, confidence_level, buy_price_1430, sell_vwap_0930_0945, gross_return_bps, cost_bps_value, slippage_bps, net_return_bps, win_flag, invalid_reason, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.taskId}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.nextTradeDate}, #{item.topK}, #{item.costBps}, #{item.stockCode}, #{item.shortName}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.score}, #{item.confidenceLevel}, #{item.buyPrice1430}, #{item.sellVwap09300945}, #{item.grossReturnBps}, #{item.costBpsValue}, #{item.slippageBps}, #{item.netReturnBps}, #{item.winFlag}, #{item.invalidReason}, #{item.createdAt} )
